name: SITE Centers Corp.
business: SITE Centers Corp. is a self-administered and self-managed Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) in the business of owning, leasing, redeveloping and managing shopping centers. As of December 31, 2025, the Company's portfolio consisted of 19 shopping centers aggregating 5.0 million square feet of Company-owned GLA. The Company intends to pursue the marketing and sale of its remaining wholly-owned properties and to monetize the value of its investment in the DTP joint venture.

exposures.sentence: An increase in e-commerce market share may have an adverse impact on the Company's tenants and business.

Any significant failures or disruptions of the Company's critical information systems, including ransomware attacks or other cyber incidents, that impact the availability or other proper functioning of these systems or that result in the compromise of sensitive or confidential information, including information of tenants, employees, and others (including joint venture partners and Curbline Properties), could result in liability for the Company to third parties and have a significant impact on the Company's operations and reputation.

catalysts.event: Expected closing of two property sales in first quarter of 2026
catalysts.sentence: As of February 26, 2026, the Company had entered into agreements to sell two properties for which the buyers general due diligence periods had expired. These transactions are expected to close in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Expiration of Shared Services Agreement on October 1, 2027
catalysts.sentence: Unless terminated earlier, the term of the Shared Services Agreement will expire on October 1, 2027.
